content.en:
Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with these Eternal Yin Spirits, but found that he was not an opponent.

In desperation, he chose to retreat.

"I'll have to let other replica bodies help~!"

Ye Tian's other replica bodies rushed over one after another, and several replica bodies came to this Eternal Yin Spirit Lair together to fight against this group of Eternal Yin Spirits.

However.

Ye Tian found that his strength was still a little worse, mainly because the strength of one of these Eternal Yin Spirits was too strong, although it was not as good as the Eternal Yin Spirit of the Eternal Realm God Realm, it was definitely the top half-step Eternal Yin Spirit of the Eternal Realm God-Realm.

Ye Tian's several duplicate bodies shot together, but they couldn't help the Eternal Yin Spirit, plus other Eternal Yin Spirits as assistance, he was still repulsed.

If he encountered an Eternal Dao Realm with similar strength, he could also use the Evil Punishment Vine to deal with them, but they were Eternal Yin Spirits, and the Evil Punishment Vine did not pose any threat to them.

"Maybe the Eternal Devourer will be able to deal with them!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Eternal Devouring Spear is the remnant of the Eternal Devouring Tree, mainly devouring the Eternal Dao Seed and making the Eternal Dao Seed demonic, but it still has terrifying lethality, and as a weapon, it surpasses the existence of those top Eternal Dao Divine Soldiers.

He had tried, and the Eternal Devourer Spear could also devour the enemy's power, and the piercing wounds were terrifying.

If you attack these Eternal Yin Spirits with the Eternal Devouring Spear, you should be able to defeat them.

......

The Endless Realm.

A copy of Ye Tian's body rushed to the Eternal Yin Wind Belt with the Eternal Devouring Spear, and it was also very risky to bring the Eternal Devouring Spear over this time.

In the event of encountering an Eternal Yin Spirit comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm, then the Eternal Devouring Spear may be lost.

But this is very unlikely, so it is natural to take the risk and try it.

Once successful, he will be able to obtain the treasure.

After some time, Ye Tian rushed to the location of the Eternal Yin Spirit Lair and launched another attack.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian held the Eternal Devouring Spear in his hand and directly stabbed at one of the Eternal Yin Spirits.

Poof!!!

The Eternal Yin Spirit was impaled with a single shot, and it dissipated instantly.

"What a terrifying lethality, one hit kills!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Next, his other replica bodies and other Eternal Yin Spirits continued to kill.

He didn't rush to deal with the most powerful Eternal Yin Spirit, he just barely held it.

He dealt with the weaker Eternal Yin Spirits first, and then dealt with the most powerful Eternal Yin Spirits with all his might.

Kill!

Kill!

Kill!

One Eternal Yin Spirit after another was slaughtered by Ye Tian, and gradually, only the most powerful Eternal Yin Spirit was left.

Rumble!!!

The Eternal Devouring Spear killed the other party, and the other party tried his best to resist, but he was still blown away, and a trace of power on his body was absorbed by the Eternal Devouring Spear.

"It worked!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to besiege and kill this Eternal Yin Spirit, relying on the Eternal Realm Devouring Spear to continuously weaken the opponent's strength.

Gradually, the opponent's strength became weaker and weaker, until he was not Ye Tian's opponent, and was surrounded and killed by several copies of Ye Tian's body.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian carefully picked this demonic red flower, and this flower quickly entered Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed.

Really.

This treasure was also influencing Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed, but it was unable to transform it into a demon, and at the same time as it was impacting, it was also releasing an energy to refine his Eternal Dao Seed.

"Hey, the effect is even better than the evil vine, this time I made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Ye Tian left quickly, so as not to encounter danger here, it would be bad.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian returned, he was in a good mood at the moment, after all, this time he had obtained the flower comparable to the evil vine.

He used the Eternal Mirror to identify it and learned the name of the treasure.

【Soul Eater Demon Flower】

Moreover, the Soul Devouring Demon Flower is the same as the Evil Vine, it can affect the Eternal Dao Seed and make the Eternal Dao Seed demonized, but it can also refine the Eternal Dao Seed and the Eternal Demon Seed, which is a very good thing for him.

"With the Soul Devouring Demon Flower and the Evil Vine, my Eternal Dao Seed will be refined faster and will quickly become stronger. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

This kind of treasure, he naturally wanted more, so that his Eternal Dao Seed would grow faster.

"Next, continue to search for this kind of treasure in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, and if you're lucky, you can find more of this kind of treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Time flies.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

On this day, a piece of good news came, Ye Xingchen's Eternal Dao Body had been elevated to the realm of perfection, and his strength far surpassed that of the past.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen also gave the Tree Heart Demon to his mother Xiao Yue.

Of course.

Ye Xingchen's strength improved so quickly, and it was not exposed, and he was also very low-key in the Endless Country, otherwise Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen broke through so quickly in a row, and the fool would know that there was a problem.

He was not afraid of the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm now, he was afraid of causing the existence of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm.

Therefore, Ye Xingchen carefully studied the secret technique of the Eternal Dao Seed in the following years, and slowly improved the Eternal Dao Seed.

this day.

Qin He invited many of the Eternal Realm's lords to discuss the matter of the Demon Seed Abyss.

Ye Tian and the other lords of the country went over and discussed the meeting in the capital of the kingdom of all gods.

At this meeting, almost all the lords of the country came, and only a few of the lords went out to experience and did not return, nor did they have time to return, so they did not participate.

meeting.

As a representative, Qin He spoke: "Everyone, this meeting is mainly to discuss the matter of the six demon seed abysses of our Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance. "

"Lord Qinhe, isn't the Demon Seed Abyss going to riot again?"

One of the lords asked.

Qin He nodded, "Well, there are signs of riots, and the most important thing is the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, the problem is a bit serious." Before, when my master was still there, he could suppress the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, but without the suppression of his master, the problem of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss would be serious. "

Ye Tian asked, "Lord Qinhe, what should I do now?"

Qin He frowned and said: "The Demon Seed Abyss is very troublesome, many of our country lords and the Eternal Dao Realm, the Eternal Dao Seed problem is relatively serious, and we dare not enter the Demon Seed Abyss casually." Moreover, in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, there is also a Demon Seed whose strength is incomparably close to the Eternal Realm God Realm, with the help of the Eternal Demon Pillar of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, even my master did not dare to step into the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and we have no way to help the Demon Seeds of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss. However, this time, I hope to mobilize a large number of Eternal Dao Realms and country lords to lure some demon seeds out and kill them, so that the future demon seed riot crisis can be solved. "。
